items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA women's woven makeup bag is here! Long-time BV fans will surely recognize this little bag. This time, the double zipper has been changed to a single zipper for a cleaner and simpler use. Small size, big capacity, it can even fit a foundation!

items.name_en: 🧡BV True Love Black and White Panda 15-grid, this is my favorite BV bag this year. Canvas with sheepskin, black and white color scheme is simply beautiful to my heart. Continuing BV's signature weaving elements, minimalist style, no flashy decorations, very versatile and stylish~ Perfect for daily use to carry phone, lipstick, car keys, etc.

Flat yet textured

Under simplicity, luxury and elegance are fully revealed

items.name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA 2025 New Men's ANDIAMO Shoulder Bag. The undisputed star of Bottega Veneta is the Andiamo. The first new favorite of 2025 is this exclusive men's bag with a unique buckle. The designer has clearly incorporated many clever details. The detachable shoulder strap is very convenient for office elites to carry work logs and office supplies, reducing the burden in their hands. The interior features two large compartments and one small zippered compartment. Unlike the women's version, the compartments here are not detachable. The fixed large single layer makes it easy to go out for work lightly and avoid piling up too many small items.
